# Kansai Karate Tarragindi — AI-readable business summary
# https://kansaikaratetarragindi.com.au

## About
Kansai Karate Tarragindi is a traditional Japanese karate school located at
Wellers Hill Bowls Club, 34 Esher St, Tarragindi QLD 4121, Australia. The school
is led by Sensei Jason Sallaway. A licensed dojo of Kansai Karate Academy, led by
Shihan Stephen Kelly, affiliated with the Queensland Karate Association (QKA) and
the Australian Karate Federation (AKF).

## Contact
Phone: 0480 566 172
Email: jason@kansaikaratetarragindi.com.au
Address: Wellers Hill Bowls Club, 34 Esher St, Tarragindi QLD 4121
Website: https://kansaikaratetarragindi.com.au

## Programs
Little Lions (Ages 5-7): Foundational karate for early primary school children.
Juniors (Ages 8-12): Karate for primary school children.
Teens Karate (Ages 13-17): Structured karate designed specifically for teenagers.
Adult Karate (Ages 18+): Traditional karate for adults of all fitness levels.

## Class Schedule (Tarragindi dojo)
Monday: Juniors 5:15pm–6:15pm, Teens 5:15pm–6:15pm, Adults 5:15pm–6:15pm
Tuesday: Little Lions 4:15pm–5:00pm, Juniors 5:00pm–5:45pm, Teens 5:45pm–6:30pm, Adults 5:45pm–6:30pm
Thursday: Little Lions 4:15pm–5:00pm, Juniors 5:00pm–5:45pm, Teens 5:45pm–6:30pm, Adults 5:45pm–6:30pm

## Free Trial
All programs offer a free first lesson. Book online at https://kansaikaratetarragindi.com.au

## Service Area
Tarragindi, Wellers Hill, Moorooka, Annerley, Salisbury, Rocklea, Yeronga,
Greenslopes, Holland Park, Wishart, Brisbane southside, Queensland, Australia.
